name: GT-kitaev-thalmostidemp
source: Kitaev arXiv:2405.02434, refs/kitaev-2405.02434/approximate_algebras.tex:2192-2194 (Theorem th_almost_idemp), VERBATIM: "The space $\calA$ with the norm, involution, and unit inherited from $\Bo(\calH)$ and the multiplication $(X,Y)\mapsto X\star Y$ is an extended $O(\eta)$-$C^*$ algebra." Here $\calA=\Img\wt\Phi$ and $X\star Y=\wt\Phi(XY)$ (Choi-Effros). We APPLY this to the map F (=Kitaev Phi): F is UCP, eta-idempotent (GT-hyp), so B=Im Ftilde with X*Y=Ftilde(XY) is an extended O(eta)-C*-algebra. In particular it satisfies ALL eps-C* axioms (def-eps-cstar-algebra) with eps=O(eta): ax_prodnorm, ax_assoc, ax_* (exact involution (X*Y)^dag=Y^dag*X^dag, ||X^dag||=||X||), ax_C*, exact unit, with universal dimension-free constants.
